name: io.github.vipincr/imagen-mcp
title: Imagen (Google AI)
description: Generate, edit & convert images with Google Gemini and Imagen models over MCP.

environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_AI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Google AI (Gemini) API key. Get one at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey

environmentVariables.name: IMAGEN_MODEL_ID
environmentVariables.description: Default image model to use (e.g. gemini-3-pro-image, gemini-3.1-flash-image, imagen-4.0-ultra-generate-001).
